targets.rawSql: SELECT 'binance' AS metric, count() AS value FROM binance_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -1, now())
SELECT 'bybit' AS metric, count() AS value FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -1, now())
SELECT 'bitget' AS metric, count() AS value FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -1, now())
SELECT 'gate' AS metric, count() AS value FROM gate_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -1, now())
SELECT 'flipster' AS metric, count() AS value FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -1, now())
SELECT timestamp AS time, count() AS binance FROM binance_bookticker WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 10s ALIGN TO CALENDAR
SELECT timestamp AS time, count() AS bybit FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 10s ALIGN TO CALENDAR
SELECT timestamp AS time, count() AS bitget FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 10s ALIGN TO CALENDAR
SELECT timestamp AS time, count() AS gate FROM gate_bookticker WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 10s ALIGN TO CALENDAR
SELECT timestamp AS time, count() AS flipster FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 10s ALIGN TO CALENDAR

panels.title: Data freshness — last tick per exchange × symbol

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'binance' ex, symbol, max(timestamp) last_ts FROM binance_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) GROUP BY symbol UNION ALL SELECT 'bybit', symbol, max(timestamp) FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) GROUP BY symbol UNION ALL SELECT 'bitget', symbol, max(timestamp) FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) GROUP BY symbol UNION ALL SELECT 'gate', symbol, max(timestamp) FROM gate_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) GROUP BY symbol UNION ALL SELECT 'flipster', symbol, max(timestamp) FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -10, now()) GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY ex, symbol
SELECT timestamp, exchange, event, detail FROM collector_health WHERE timestamp > dateadd('h', -1, now()) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 200
